title: Minecraft MTR Rainbow
description: It is a MTR modpack.It is the modpack that you must use to play on the Rainbow MTR server.
body:
Minecraft MTR Rainbow整合包
- 

描述
- 
此整合包是游玩Rainbow MTR服务器（我的另一个关于[MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)模组的服务器）必须使用的整合包，它在单人游戏中是可选的，所以您可根据个人喜好下载此整合包。

如何安装？
- 
您可以在此页面下载整合包并上传至我的世界启动器安装，也可以直接在第三方启动器上下载安装整合包。

问题？
- 
如果您有任何问题，请发送邮件到 rainbow0603@outlook.com 或 liyushen1234@126.com ！

关于Rainbow MTR服务器？
- 
抱歉，Rainbow MTR服务器**暂时不对外开放**。

Description
- 
This modpack is a must-use modpack for playing Rainbow's  MTR server (my another minecraft server about [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod) and is optional for single player games, so you can download this modpack as you like.

How To Install?
- 
You can download the modpack and upload it to minecraft launcher installation from this page, or you can download and install the modpack directly from a third-party launcher.

Questions?
- 
If you have any questions, please send an email to rainbow0603@outlook.com and liyushen1234@126.com!

About Rainbow's MTR Server?
Sorry,The Rainbow's MTR server is **Closed to the public for the time being**.
